channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Xi's 'blunt' warning to Trump on Taiwan exposes profound risks: analysts
item.description:
Importance: 103.8 | Covered by: 10 feeds | Reputation: 7.7

Matched titles:
- China's Xi hails trade progress in Trump summit, sends Taiwan warning
- Trump heralds 'fantastic future' for US-China as talks with Xi begin
- Xi Warns Trump Over Taiwan During High-Stakes China Summit
- First Thing: Xi warns Trump of ‘clashes and even conflicts’ with US over Taiwan
- Xi warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing summit
- Trump says talks with Xi 'extremely positive and productive'
- Xi-Trump summit focuses on trade, Taiwan and global tensions
- Trump says talks with Xi 'extremely positive and productive'
- Xi warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing summit
- Live Updates: China’s Xi Warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing Summit
- Xi warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing summit
- Xi warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing summit
- Trump-Xi summit live: US president says relationship with China will be ‘better than ever’ as key meeting begins
- Trump lauds ‘biggest summit’ as Xi talks tackle trade, Iran
- Xi warns Trump on Taiwan at Beijing summit
- China's Xi hails trade progress in Trump summit, sends Taiwan warning
- Trump heralds 'fantastic future' for US-China as talks with Xi begin
- The Trump-Xi Summit in China: Trade, Taiwan, AI and More
- China's Xi signals trade progress as ‘biggest summit’ with Trump begins
- Trump lauds ‘biggest summit’ as Xi talks tackle trade, Iran
- Trump expresses hope for ‘fantastic future’ of US-China ties as talks with Xi begin
- China's Xi signals trade progress as ‘biggest summit’ with Trump begins
